narrative:
Precinct Sunsbury (precinct in Monroe County) has 743 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.1 percentage points.
